title: Empowering young minds in the heart of George
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Curro George is a primary...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Curro George is a primary school situated in George Central, committed to providing the learners in our community with access to high-quality education.


> We offer independent schooling that supports each child’s academic, social and emotional growth. Our holistic approach focuses on developing confident, respectful and globally minded learners.


With small classes, hands-on technology and enriching programmes such as chess and robotics, we create a stimulating, supportive environment in which children thrive in every aspect of their development.

Our foundation phase lays the groundwork for Grade R learners, building essential skills in language, maths and life skills. As learners move into the intermediate phase, teaching becomes more abstract, with project-based activities that promote research, critical thinking and creativity beyond the textbook.

The Best of George nomination reflects the collective passion and dedication of our entire school community, teachers, learners, families and staff, all of whom share a vision of nurturing excellence and well-rounded growth.

Curro George is built on strong values that help each learner grow into the best version of themselves. These values are rooted in four key pillars: child-friendliness, positive discipline, Christian values (ethics and morals) and creative thinking.

We grow alongside our learners, embracing innovation, strengthening connections with families and supporting our teachers every step of the way. This shared journey keeps our approach fresh, relevant and full of possibility.

Winning Best of George would be more than recognition; it would celebrate the spirit of a community that empowers young leaders and lays the foundation for lifelong success.


> Vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/


Contact:

- 087 087 7917
- [email protected]
- Cnr Victoria and Merriman Street George
- www.curro.co.za

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
